step_rationale: Tryptophan metabolism intermediate; STEMI biomarker reflecting metabolic dysregulation.
mechanism: Xanthurenic acid dysregulation reflects impaired tryptophan metabolism and systemic metabolic stress in acute MI.

references.title: Targeted metabolomic profiling of acute ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction.
Urinary metabonomic study of patients with acute coronary syndrome using UPLC-QTOF/MS.
references.journal: Journal of chromatography. B, Analytical technologies in the biomedical and life sciences
